Speaker 1 mentions their office location is near the Jalandhar bus stand and invites Speaker 0 to visit. Speaker 1 also provides their phone number and asks Speaker 0 to save it.
Speaker 1 provides their name as Aarti Apa Ji, but later says their name is Rishu. Speaker 0 and Speaker 1 also exchange phone numbers.
